channel.title: SSbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How a Spanish startup pivoted to video AI and built a $230 million ARR business with no VC funding
item.description: Freepik is rebranding itself as Magnific, as cofounder and CEO Joaquín Cuenca Abela rebuilds the company for an AI future.

item.title: Bob Diamond: The settlement window is closing as 24/7 trading opens up
item.description: Hyperliquid isn't a crypto casino, the ex-Barclays CEO says. it's a demonstration of how financial markets look when you strip out decades of friction...

item.title: Trump’s ‘gold card’ visas were supposed to solve the $39 trillion national debt. They’ve only sold one
item.description: Gold card revenue "may be earmarked for deficit reduction, but it actually could be more money than that," Trump previously told reporters.

item.title: The Small U.K. Agency That’s a 911 for Ships in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: At a military base outside Portsmouth, England, a 24-hour service monitors the Persian Gulf, the Red Sea and part of the Indian Ocean, responding to d...
